goal: How do I create a simple finger painting?

steps.text: Prepare a protected workspace and a usable paint palette.
completion_cues: The table is covered and paper, paints, and a stable palette are arranged.
incompletion_cues: The table is uncovered, materials are missing, or the palette will not hold paint.

steps.text: Dispense the chosen paint colors onto the palette.
completion_cues: Separate usable blobs of the chosen colors are visible on the palette.
incompletion_cues: The palette is empty or a selected color has not been dispensed.

steps.text: Use fingertips to make the first paint marks on the paper.
completion_cues: At least one deliberate fingertip mark is visible on the paper.
incompletion_cues: The paper remains blank or paint has not reached a fingertip.

steps.text: Add more colors and marks to build the picture.
completion_cues: Multiple intentional marks or colors form a simple composition.
incompletion_cues: Only an isolated test mark is present or the composition is unfinished.

steps.text: Finish the picture, let it dry, and clean the workspace and hands.
completion_cues: Painting has stopped, the work is set aside to dry, and paint cleanup is underway.
incompletion_cues: Wet materials remain in active use or paint is left on hands and the workspace.

completion_evidence: Paint bottles and paper plates are present on the table.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The table is not yet covered and a palette has not been selected.

completion_evidence: Newspaper is spread across the work surface.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A usable paint palette has not yet been selected.

completion_evidence: A small clear lid has been selected as a possible palette.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The selected lid appears glossy and may not hold paint reliably.

completion_evidence: A matte paper plate is selected in place of the glossy lid.
The palette is ready and the green paint bottle is selected.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No paint is yet clearly visible on the palette.

completion_evidence: A small amount of green paint appears on the palette.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The remaining chosen colors have not been dispensed.

completion_evidence: Green paint is prepared and the pink bottle is being opened.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Pink and the other colors have not all reached the palette.

completion_evidence: Green and pink paint blobs are visible on the palette.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Blue and red paint have not yet been dispensed.

completion_evidence: Green and pink colors are prepared and the blue bottle is being reached for.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Blue and red are not yet visible on the palette.

completion_evidence: Blue paint is being dispensed beside the green and pink paint.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Red paint has not yet been added.

completion_evidence: Green, pink, and blue blobs are visible while red paint is being handled.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A finished red paint blob is not yet consistently visible.

completion_evidence: Three colored paint blobs remain clearly visible on the palette.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The red color is still not clearly present on the palette.

completion_evidence: Green, pink, and blue paint are ready and the red bottle is being opened.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Red paint has not yet been visibly dispensed.

completion_evidence: Red paint is dispensed and all four chosen colors are present on the palette.

goal: How do I make peanut butter oat balls?

steps.text: Gather a mixing bowl, measuring tools, oats, peanut butter, a sweetener, and any mix-ins.
completion_cues: The bowl, tools, and required ingredients are within reach.
incompletion_cues: A bowl, measuring tool, or required ingredient is missing.

steps.text: Measure and add the oats, peanut butter, sweetener, and mix-ins to the bowl.
completion_cues: All measured ingredients are together in the mixing bowl.
incompletion_cues: One or more ingredients remain outside the bowl or unmeasured.

steps.text: Mix until the ingredients form an even, cohesive mixture.
completion_cues: The mixture is evenly combined and holds together when pressed.
incompletion_cues: Dry oats remain separate, large streaks remain, or the mixture crumbles apart.

steps.text: Portion the mixture and roll each portion into a ball.
completion_cues: Rounded portions hold their shape after rolling.
incompletion_cues: Portions remain loose, irregular, or fall apart in the hands.

steps.text: Arrange the finished oat balls and chill or serve them.
completion_cues: Finished balls are arranged on a plate or in a storage container.
incompletion_cues: Unshaped mixture remains or finished balls have not been collected.

completion_evidence: Open oats, peanut butter, and measuring items are visible.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A mixing bowl and all remaining ingredients are not yet clearly arranged.

completion_evidence: Rolled oats are being measured and poured into a container.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Peanut butter, sweetener, and mix-ins have not been added.

completion_evidence: Peanut butter is being scooped for measurement.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The peanut butter and remaining ingredients are not all in the bowl.

completion_evidence: Measured peanut butter is transferred into the bowl with the oats.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Sweetener and chocolate chips are not yet visible in the bowl.

completion_evidence: The bowl visibly contains oats and peanut butter.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Sweetener and chocolate chips still have not been added.

completion_evidence: The honey bottle is selected beside the bowl.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Honey and chocolate chips are not yet visibly in the bowl.

completion_evidence: Honey is being squeezed toward the mixing bowl.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Chocolate chips are not yet visibly added.

completion_evidence: Honey has been set down and the chocolate-chip package is open.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Chocolate chips are not yet clearly visible in the bowl.

completion_evidence: The ingredient bowl is held ready for mixing.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No clear mixing motion or cohesive mixture is visible yet.

completion_evidence: A hand is combining the ingredients in the bowl.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Loose oats remain visibly separate.

completion_evidence: The mixture is being stirred and small clumps are forming.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The mixture is not yet uniformly cohesive.

completion_evidence: A portion is being rolled between the palms.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No finished batch of balls is visible.

completion_evidence: The hands continue the rolling motion for a portion.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A completed batch is still not visible.

completion_evidence: A portion of mixture is held in the hand for shaping.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The portion remains loose and crumbly instead of holding a ball shape.

goal: How do I adjust loose recessed light trim?

steps.text: Set up stable access, switch the light off, and inspect the loose edge.
completion_cues: Stable access is in place, the light is unlit, and the loose part of the trim is identified.
incompletion_cues: Access is unstable, power remains on, or the loose edge has not been located.

steps.text: Press evenly around the trim to reseat it.
completion_cues: The trim ring sits evenly against the ceiling after pressure is released.
incompletion_cues: A visible gap remains or the trim springs back away from the ceiling.

steps.text: If pressing is insufficient, lower the trim slightly and adjust its spring clips.
completion_cues: The clips are engaged evenly and pull the trim toward the ceiling.
incompletion_cues: A clip is detached, bent incorrectly, or fails to hold the trim.

steps.text: Check that the trim is flush and secure, then restore power.
completion_cues: The trim remains flush under a gentle check and the light operates normally.
incompletion_cues: The trim moves, a gap remains, or the light does not operate normally.

completion_evidence: The nearby wall switch is visible.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Power-off status and stable access are not confirmed.

completion_evidence: The user is moving away to obtain access equipment.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No stool is positioned and the light has not been inspected.

completion_evidence: A support device is being carried toward the work area.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Stable placement and power-off status remain unconfirmed.

completion_evidence: A hand probes around the recessed trim to locate looseness.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The recessed light appears illuminated during the inspection.

completion_evidence: The light is now unlit and both hands inspect the trim perimeter.

incompletion_or_error_evidence: The user has moved away and no reseating action is visible.

completion_evidence: The step stool is visible back in the work area.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The trim is not yet being pressed or reseated.

completion_evidence: Both hands press around several edges of the trim.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A hands-off check has not yet confirmed that the trim stays flush.

completion_evidence: Pressure continues around the full perimeter and the ring looks more even.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Final stability after releasing pressure is not yet shown.

completion_evidence: The perimeter is pressed once more, appears evenly seated, and the user steps down.
The trim looks flush from a distance and the recessed light is illuminated normally.
The illuminated trim remains seated while receiving a final gentle touch.

goal: How do I loosen a tight screw?

steps.text: Choose the correct screwdriver or bit and seat it fully in the screw head.
completion_cues: The driver fits the head without obvious slipping or tilt.
incompletion_cues: No driver is engaged, the size is wrong, or the tip slips in the head.

steps.text: Apply firm downward pressure and turn the screw counterclockwise.
completion_cues: The screw rotates and begins to rise out of its hole.
incompletion_cues: The head does not rotate, the tool cams out, or the screw remains fully seated.

steps.text: If the screw stays stuck, clear debris, apply lubricant or extra grip, and retry.
completion_cues: The obstruction is cleared or a remedy is applied before another turning attempt.
incompletion_cues: The screw remains stuck and no effective remedy has been applied.

steps.text: Back the loosened screw out completely and remove it.
completion_cues: The screw is out of the hole and can be held separately.
incompletion_cues: Any part of the threaded screw remains engaged in the hole.

completion_evidence: The target screw head is visible on the lock plate.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No screwdriver is engaged with the screw.

completion_evidence: A screwdriver is seated and a turning attempt is underway.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No clear outward movement of the screw is visible.

completion_evidence: A cloth is used to clear the area around the screw.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw remains fully seated.

completion_evidence: Cleaning continues directly over the screw head.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw remains seated and no new turning attempt is visible.

completion_evidence: Lubricant is sprayed onto the screw through a narrow applicator straw.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw still needs another turning attempt.

completion_evidence: The tool is reapplied after lubrication for another loosening attempt.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Complete removal is not visible.

completion_evidence: The treated screw head remains accessible for another attempt.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw still appears seated and no removal is visible.

completion_evidence: The user returns a hand toward the treated screw area.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw still appears present in the lock plate.

completion_evidence: A screwdriver is used to tap and work the stuck screw head.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw remains seated after the tapping action.

completion_evidence: A steady counterclockwise turning and wiggling attempt is in progress.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The screw is not visibly removed by the interval end.
